zh.lifeSummary: John de Whitmore是John whitmore和Cecily or Cecilia de Hallowell的兒子，於1358年出生在英國英格蘭爾。他於1374年與Alice de Chester在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1438年3月24日在他的家鄉享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John de Whitmore是John whitmore和Cecily or Cecilia de Hallowell的儿子，于1358年出生在英国英格兰爾。他于1374年与Alice de Chester在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1438年3月24日在他的家乡享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Whitmore
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Whitmoor (Devon) or Whitmore (Staffordshire and Dorset), or from any of numerous other places in England with names denoting a white moor or mere (from Old English hwīt ‘white’ + mōr ‘moor’ or mere ‘pool’).
History: Francis Whitmore settled in Cambridge, MA, before 1648.

variants.name: Whittemore
meanings: History: Thomas Whittemore came from England to Charlestown, MA, in or c. 1639. Amos Whittemore, born in Cambridge, MA, in 1759 was an inventor and gunsmith, and another Thomas Whittemore was born in Boston in 1800; he was a Universalist clergyman and MA legislator.

variants.name: Whitmer
meanings: Americanized form of German   Wittmeyer   or of   Wittmer  .

variants.name: Whitmarsh
meanings: English: habitational name from Whitemarsh, a place in the parish of Sedgehill, Wiltshire, named from Old English hwīt ‘white’ (i.e. ‘phosphorescent’) + mersc ‘marsh’. Compare Whitmore .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: John de Whitmore was born in 1358, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of John whitmore and Cecily or Cecilia de Hallowell. He married Alice de Chester in 1374, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 24 March 1438, in his hometown, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: John de Whitmore est né en 1358, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de John whitmore et Cecily or Cecilia de Hallowell. Il a épousé Alice de Chester en 1374, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 24 mars 1438, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: John de Whitmore wurde 1358 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von John whitmore und Cecily or Cecilia de Hallowell geboren. Er hat 1374 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Alice de Chester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 24. März 1438 im Alter von 80 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: John de Whitmore è nato il nel 1358 nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di John whitmore e Cecily or Cecilia de Hallowell. Lui sposato Alice de Chester nel 1374, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 24 marzo 1438, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Whitmoreは1358年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでJohn whitmoreとCecily or Cecilia de Hallowellの息子として生まれた。1374年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでAlice de Chesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1438年3月24日に故郷で80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Whitmore(은)는 1358년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 John whitmore(와)과 Cecily or Cecilia de Hallowell의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1374년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Alice de Chester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1438년 3월 24일 그의 고향에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: John de Whitmore nasceu em 1358, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de John whitmore e Cecily or Cecilia de Hallowell. Ele casou-se com Alice de Chester em 1374, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 24 de março de 1438, em sua cidade natal, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: John de Whitmore родился в 1358 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали John whitmore и Cecily or Cecilia de Hallowell. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Chester в 1374 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 24 марта 1438 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: John de Whitmore nació en 1358, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de John whitmore y Cecily or Cecilia de Hallowell. Se casó con Alice de Chester en 1374, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 24 de marzo de 1438, en su pueblo, a la edad de 80 años.
